name: google-workspace-mcp
description: Give AI agents access to Gmail, Calendar, Drive, and more — with multi-account support and manifest-driven API coverage

tools.name: manage_accounts
tools.description: Manage Google Workspace account lifecycle: list, authenticate, check status, refresh credentials, update scopes

tools.name: manage_email
tools.description: Search, read, send, forward, trash, label, and manage Gmail messages and threads

tools.name: manage_calendar
tools.description: List events, view agenda, create, update, delete events, check availability

tools.name: manage_drive
tools.description: Search, upload, download, copy, delete, export, share Google Drive files, and read/write Google Sheets and Docs

tools.name: queue_operations
tools.description: Chain multiple operations sequentially with result references between steps

google_client_id.title: Google OAuth Client ID
google_client_id.description: Create at https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials — OAuth 2.0 Client ID (Desktop application)

google_client_secret.title: Google OAuth Client Secret
google_client_secret.description: The client secret from your OAuth 2.0 credentials

workspace_dir.title: Workspace Directory
workspace_dir.description: Directory for file operations (upload/download/export). Must be a dedicated folder — not your home, Documents, Desktop, or Google Drive directory. Default: ~/.local/share/google-workspace-mcp/workspace/
